prompt: Three boxes are labeled APPLES, ORANGES, and MIXED, but every label is wrong. You may draw one fruit from one box. Which box should you draw from first to determine every box correctly?
If all glims are flarps and no flarps are zibs, which statement must be true?
Five people line up from left to right. Li is left of Chen. Wang is right of Zhao. Chen is right of Zhao. Which pair order must be true?
choices: A. Li is left of Zhao
B. Zhao is left of Chen
C. Wang is left of Chen
D. Chen is left of Zhao
